description: A color photograph of six men in suits standing in a row and posing for the camera on a low stage. Behind them a screen and a placard on an easel both display OPERATION TWIN SHIELD with the Department of Homeland Security and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services and FBI names. An American flag and a second flag stand among the group. The image carries no overlaid caption.
notable_text: OPERATION TWIN SHIELD; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; FBI
